title: Concurrency with async/await
description: Write clean asynchronous code with Swift's modern concurrency features.

sections.title: Async/Await Demo
sections.expectedOutput:
Fetching user info sequentially...
Name: User 1
Email: user1@example.com
Time: ~0.20s

Fetching user info in parallel...
Name: User 1
Email: user1@example.com
Time: ~0.10s

sections.question: What happens when you use 'async let' for two independent tasks?
sections.explanation: 'async let' spawns both tasks concurrently, allowing them to run in parallel until awaited.
